 我把好评赞赞赞","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyTTxpNgqPToE63qSlSS7FwAPWPiyupqvgJ3VTXCrqIX","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8017031e262e4bc080cf495cc6adc306~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776879714&x-signature=jMgzvF4PmpdxKBKPMeY8esF8z3o%3D","user_id":"3215411288999022","user_name":"晚宁喵喵叫墨燃魂会飘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3215411288999022","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7535526498522909758","book_info":{"abstract":"沉稳霸总攻vs穿书机灵受【穿书+1v1+双洁+甜宠】
宋挽生了重病，抢救无效死亡。
再一睁眼，他穿到了一本狗血虐恋文中，变成了那个跟他同名同姓，不断阻止男女主谈恋爱的反派搅屎棍。
为了防止书中反派的悲惨结局落在自己头上，宋挽决定改邪归正。
就像系统Siri所说，原主是作恶太多才会下场凄惨，只要他不阻止男女主谈恋爱，不针对男主，不就可以——
可以个屁！
人家穿书都是穿到开头或者中间，他都快直接穿到大结局了！
原主坏事做尽，还给男主下药意图毁男主清白。
要死！宋挽两眼一黑，直接一个百米冲刺，就算踹门也要把男主从放了催情药的酒店房间里解救出来。
可是房门一开，一头栽进沙发里的宋挽傻眼了。
什么情况？
房间里中药的不是男主，怎么是女主她哥啊！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3228d60c8b02b84251894c8f958274c3","author":"对对对你说的对","author_id":"","book_id":"7535526498522909758","book_name":"穿成反派后，我跟女主她哥HE了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c0b8c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7535526727770964542","read_count":"70873","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"302332"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"131","tags":"双男主,穿书,双洁,现代,1v1,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o18b1d2c2b3b1a8d9a38bb981e3cd1967~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779506176&x-signature=TxRsKv7jHTh%2BQEQ%2F1v%2FckHqevds%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2283032727008616","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"10"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032411161613096CB1F2471A736ED9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":251,"forwar “如果在这个世界上活着是一题很难的数学题，那你就是我演算无数遍唯一正解的答案”这句真的很戳我[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]
记忆会被抹去，但爱一个人的习惯却不会消失，在我不记得你时，我的心跳和行动已经证明了一切，无论何时遇到你，是怎样的你，都会令我着迷心动，是不知何时乱跳的心，何时投去的视线，又是何时有了和你共度一生的念头，但我的灵魂从见到你的那一刻起，最原始的悸动就是答案。
小猫那一段也好戳我，一直孤独的小猫，机缘巧合被收养，在无数次回档重读时带着记忆守着记忆中的地方，等待着那个再次会把他带回家的人，动物的视角很单纯懵懂，他们不知道回档重读是什么，但仍然会回到原点等待，因为他相信那个人会带他回家[书架加一][书架加一][书架加一][书架加一][书架加一][书架加一][书架加一][飞吻]
反派是我想不到的，人物的形象也是多面的，人性复杂，利益驱动，总之就是很好看[书架加一][书架加一][书架加一][书架加一][书架加一]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760766852,"group_id":"7535526498522909758","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"心定则不止，心定则路止","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1491VatNA7XvF7eJc3n+DzoD7DSIYnvNbVs8wiKwXhv","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1d47f9cc1c6f40089e0f900a8d4e86e7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882147&x-signature=9toymoo2A31GxVfOIpA4AZMqGNA%3D","user_id":"1152767406379356","user_name":"樑妧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1152767406379356","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7535526498522909758","book_info":{"abstract":"沉稳霸总攻vs穿书机灵受【穿书+1v1+双洁+甜宠】
